meaning: n.轨迹,车辙,跟踪,航迹,足迹,路,磁轨,途径;vt.循路而行,追踪,通过,用纤拉;vi.追踪,留下足迹,走
examples: The train chugs down the track.
She sang on the backing track.
Here lies Rome's loveliest, yet off-the-beaten-track church, the simple, majestic Santa Sabina (Piazza Pietro d'Illiria 1).
But like so many, he had a horrible track record of failed diets and exercise attempts.
